title: Burger Gapples
description: This Texture pack turns your Golden Apples into Burgers!
body:
Burger Gapples [1.8.9] 🍔

Ever thought golden apples looked a little… boring? This texture pack spices things up by turning all golden apples into delicious, juicy burgers!

Whether you're clutching in PvP or just surviving in style, you’ll now be chomping down on a tasty burger instead of a plain old apple. Perfect for players who want a fun, unique twist without changing the rest of the game.

🔹 Features:

-Golden Apples retextured into mouth-watering burgers
-Works perfectly with Minecraft 1.8.9
-Clean and simple edit — no unnecessary changes
-Great for PvP, survival, and casual play

Take a bite and enjoy your new favorite in-game snack 🍔
